docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, MARCO AS TO DEFENDANT ALVARADO, RENE AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLORES, MARCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALVARADO, RENE AN INDIVIDUAL $20,486.30 PRINCIPAL, $1,091.09 INTEREST, $325.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,902.39, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
